channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Lands 16 Gigawatt U.S. Power Plant Deal And 25 Gigawatt Hour Europe Pact
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA), Sunrun, and Renew Home agreed to aggregate over 16 gigawatts of flexible residential energy capacity in the U.S. into what they describe as the largest distributed power plant. The U.S.

item.title: Elon Musk’s Tesla Under Fresh Scrutiny As Texas Crash Victim’s Family Files Wrongful-Death Lawsuit, NTSB Opens Probe
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is facing fresh legal and regulatory challenges following the National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) announcement that it will examine the fatal Texas crash that took place last week involving a Model 3 sedan. NTSB Announces Probe According to a report by Reuters on ...

item.title: SPCX, TSLA Eye Weekly Losses: Elon Musk Sheds Trillionaire Crown As SpaceX’s Red-Hot IPO Rally Loses Steam
item.description: Investors are now watching Starlink's growth and Starship's R&D spending ahead of its first public earnings report.

item.title: A bunch of cars caught fire at a Tesla dealership today.
item.description: Several cars caught fire at the Tesla dealership in Owings Mills, MD today. submitted by /u/Sweaty-Moment-3385 [link] [comments]

item.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status after tech sell-off erases billions from fortune
item.description: Elon Musk's net worth has dropped below $1 trillion after SpaceX and Tesla shares fell during a broader tech sell-off, less than two weeks after the milestone.

item.title: SpaceX’s 32% crash may force Musk into radical move
item.description: Less than two weeks ago, SpaceX became the most valuable company ever to go public, raising $75 billion at a valuation north of $1.7 trillion and closing its debut session up 19%, according to CNBC. On June 22, SpaceX posted its worst single-day loss as a public company, plunging 16% to close at ...

item.title: Is Tesla Stock Better Than SpaceX? The Answer Might Surprise You.
item.description: SpaceX went public June 12 and already is more valuable than Tesla.

item.description: Recap of Mega Munich where our team hosted customers for technical deep dives on everything from fire safety, to grid compliance, and controls https://x.com/Tesla_Megapack/status/2069819685533601834?s=20 submitted by /u/rcnfive [link] [comments]

item.title: Stock Market Today, June 24: Sunrun Jumps After Announcing Deal With Tesla and Renew Home for 16 Gigawatts of Flexible Power
item.description: On June 24, 2026, Sunrun's new partnership drew investor focus to virtual power plant economics and future growth potential.

item.title: Why a fatal crash threatens Tesla’s stock
item.description: Tesla’s (TSLA) latest federal safety probe isn't a routine crash investigation. It’s a test of one of the greatest assumptions still baked into Tesla’s stock: that the company can turn driver-assistance software into a business considerably more valuable than regular car sales. For years, Tesla h...

item.title: Analyst makes a bold call on Bitcoin over Tesla and SpaceX
item.description: Crypto analyst InvestAnswers has thrown cold water on the panic gripping the Bitcoin (BTC) market, telling investors that the leading cryptocurrency is sitting on signs of a late-stage bear market bottom, and that its biggest move may be just one round number away. In a podcast, the analyst ...

item.title: Global Battery Storage Boom Is A Boon for Tesla
item.description: Tesla signed a multi-year agreement with NatPower to deploy more than 25 GWh of battery storage across Europe.

item.title: Sunrun (RUN) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
item.description: Shares of residential solar energy company Sunrun (NASDAQ:RUN) jumped 19.2% in the afternoon session after the company announced a partnership with Tesla and Renew Home to provide more than 16 gigawatts of flexible energy capacity to utilities and large-scale data centers, often called hyperscalers.

item.title: OPEN CEO Takes $1 Salary As $741 Million Tesla-Style Pay Package Bets On A Housing Market Turnaround
item.description: Opendoor Technologies Inc. CEO Kaz Nejatian is working for a base salary of just $1 in cash, yet he has secured a staggering $741 million accounting valuation in pure stock-based “alignment”—an aggressive, milestone-driven compensation package that mirrors the legendary moonshot incentive structu...

item.title: This ETF Is Feasting on SpaceX Stock. It's Also a Play on a Possible Tesla Acquisition.
item.description: The Baron First Principles ETF has quickly asserted itself as the primary ETF proxy on SpaceX stock.

item.title: RUN Stock Pops as Sunrun Teams Up With Tesla, Renew Home on Data Centers
item.description: Sunrun stock is rallying on a new deal with Tesla and Renew Home. But is there any further upside left in RUN shares? Let’s find out!

item.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as SpaceX and Tesla stock drops
item.description: Falling shares push tech mogul back down to billionaire ranks after SpaceX IPO made him world’s first trillionaire

item.title: Tesla, Sunrun team up on 16 GW virtual power plant for data centers
item.description: Sunrun, Tesla, and Renew Home announced an agreement today to aggregate more than 16 gigawatts of home batteries, thermostats, and other devices into what they say would be the largest distributed power plant in the country, aimed squarely at the surging electricity demand from data centers. The ...

item.title: Better Buy: SpaceX or the "Magnificent Seven"?
item.description: SpaceX's market cap is in the same trillion-dollar-plus range as those tech giants, but does it have similar strengths to them as a business?

item.title: Elon Musk was the world’s first trillionaire for 12 days
item.description: The run ended due to falling SpaceX stock and a Forbes accounting change.

item.title: Tesla Sued Over Texas Crash
item.description: Family says Tesla's driver-assistance systems played a role in the fatal accident.

item.title: Solar Stock Soars On Power Pact With Tesla For AI Data Centers
item.description: The companies are combining to create what they called the largest distributed power plant in the country.

item.title: Elon Musk Gives A Nod As Nvidia Argues AI Data Centers Aren't The Water Drain Many Believe: 'Numbers May Surprise You'
item.description: As concerns grow over artificial intelligence’s environmental impact, Tesla Inc. and Space Exploration Technologies Corp. CEO Elon Musk backed Nvidia Corp’s argument that data centers consume a surprisingly small share of America’s water supply.

item.title: Beyond the SpaceX Chatter: Why Tesla’s Upcoming Delivery Numbers Still Matter
item.description: Tesla stock has declined since SpaceX debuted. EV deliveries could be a catalyst for shares of the electric-vehicle maker.

item.title: Tesla Is Giving Away Free Supercharging. Here's How To Win.
item.description: Tesla is gamifying charging and will reward the winners with free Supercharging for the life of the car. Here's how to win.

item.title: TSLA Stock Holds Flat — Tesla Hit With Wrongful Death Lawsuit, NTSB Probe Over Fatal Texas Crash
item.description: The family of the 76-year-old woman killed when a Tesla Model 3 plowed into their suburban Houston home has filed a wrongful death lawsuit against Tesla and the driver, NBC News reported.

item.title: Sunrun Surges 26% on 16-Gigawatt Virtual Power Plant Deal With Tesla and Renew Home
item.description: Sunrun (NASDAQ:RUN) stock is up 26% to $16.17 in midday trading Wednesday after the residential solar leader unveiled a sweeping virtual power plant (VPP) partnership with Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and Renew Home. The intraday move tracks toward one of Sunrun’s biggest single-session gains in months. T...

item.title: Tesla and driver sued by family of woman killed in Texas crash: what we know
item.description: Tesla is being sued by the family of the woman who was killed in a Texas crash involving a Model 3. The driver, who is also being sued, claimed the vehicle was operating on Autopilot mode, but Tesla executives have come out challenging that claim , stating that the driver of the vehicle overrode ...

item.title: Sunrun Stock Just Wiped Out Its 2026 Losses in One Day. Here’s Why.
item.description: The solar-energy company is partnering with home energy platform Renew Home and electric car maker Tesla to power data centers.

item.title: Should You Forget Tesla and Buy SpaceX Instead?
item.description: There's plenty of speculation about a merger, and these two companies might be an ideal operational fit, but their investment profiles differ significantly.

item.title: RUN Stock Surges On Partnership With Tesla, Renew Home – Sunrun CEO Says Grid Of 1800s Can’t ‘Power The Innovation Of 2026’
item.description: Sunrun, Tesla, and Renew Home entered into an agreement to deliver more than 16 gigawatts of flexible energy capacity to hyperscalers and utilities.

item.title: Elon Musk’s trillionaire status slips as SpaceX shares swing
item.description: He is now worth an estimated 962 billion dollars (£731.4 billion), as of the end of the day on Tuesday, Forbes said.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck is officially the safest pickup, IIHS says
item.description: The Insurance Institute for Highway Safety (IIHS) has awarded the 2025-2026 Tesla Cybertruck crew cab pickup its highest honor: Top Safety Pick+. This marks the Cybertruck as the only full-size pickup to achieve this distinction in recent evaluations. The award applies specifically to vehicles bu...

item.title: Cathie Wood Loads Up On Palantir, Cerebras, These Mag 7 Players
item.description: Cathie Wood and ARK Invest on Tuesday purchased $49 million of Amazon, Tesla, Alphabet, Palantir, CoreWeave and Cerebras.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Seen Trading More Like a SpaceX Proxy as Merger Talk Grows
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 15 AI Stocks Analysts Are Watching: Microsoft, Nvidia, and More. On June 22, Jefferies reiterated the stock as hold and raised its price target to $375 per share from $350.

item.title: Tesla sued over fatal crash in Texas home that killed 76-year-old woman
item.description: The family of a 76-year-old woman killed when a Tesla Model 3 crashed into her Katy, Texas, home has sued Tesla and the driver, alleging the company’s “Autopilot” and “Full Self-Driving” systems are defectively designed. The wrongful death suit lands just days after the crash — and it leans on th...

item.title: Elon Musk rips the US system of taxing what you earn, buy, and own. Do this now to keep more of your cash
item.description: Making the most of your margins is only the first step.

item.title: Tesla Under Pressure Again: Is the Bear Case Getting Overplayed?
item.description: TSLA's safety probe adds pressure, but energy growth, improving overseas deliveries, and FSD approvals may make selling the stock premature.

item.title: Sunrun Surges After Forming Data Centre Energy Alliance With Tesla and Renew Home (RUN)
item.description: Sunrun (NASDAQ:RUN) shares jumped 16% on Wednesday after the residential solar company announced a partnership with Renew Home and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) aimed at supplying more than 16 gigawatts of flexible energy capacity to hyperscale data centre operators and utility companies. The initiative is...

item.title: SpaceX’s Stock Slide Costs Elon Musk His Trillionaire Title
item.description: The stock market selloff this week has been painful for investors but spare a thought for Elon Musk. The SpaceX and Tesla CEO has already lost his trillionaire status following a sharp drop in the share price of both companies. Tesla’s 5.8% drop Tuesday took Musk’s net worth to $957 billion, ...

item.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as SpaceX stock falls
item.description: A broad market selloff pushed Musk's net worth below $1 trillion, to $957 billion, according to Bloomberg

item.description: SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) continued to recover in premarket trading on Wednesday after rebounding from losses that briefly pushed the stock below its post-IPO opening price. Shares closed Tuesday up 0.

item.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status after Wall Street slump
item.description: Elon Musk is no longer a trillionaire after a global rout in tech shares wiped $500bn (£379bn) off his fortune.
